center.name: 斯阔米什
center.summary: 斯阔米什是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白頭海鵰，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: From November until February, one to two thousand birds winter in Squamish, British Columbia, about halfway between Vancouver and Whistler

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: From November until February, one to two thousand birds winter in Squamish, British Columbia, about halfway between Vancouver and Whistler
